architecture.description:
### High Level Architecture

#### Application type
Cloud-native autonomous coding agent platform - serverless web application with CLI and API interfaces

#### Layers
- Presentation: CLI client, REST API, webhooks, web dashboard
- Orchestration: Lambda-based task orchestrator with durable execution
- Compute: AgentCore Runtime with MicroVM isolation for agent execution
- Data: DynamoDB tables for state, AgentCore Memory for cross-task learning
- Security: Cognito authentication, VPC isolation, Bedrock Guardrails

#### Boundaries
- External: GitHub repositories, Bedrock AI models, user CLI/API clients
- Internal: VPC-isolated agent runtime, DynamoDB state persistence
- Trust: Cognito user pools, HMAC webhook authentication, IAM roles

#### Technology components
- AWS CDK with TypeScript for infrastructure as code
- Python agent runtime with Claude Agent SDK
- Node.js Lambda functions for API handlers and orchestration
- AWS AgentCore Runtime for secure agent execution
- Amazon Bedrock for AI model access (Claude Sonnet/Haiku)
- DynamoDB for task state and event persistence
- Amazon Cognito for user authentication

#### Deployment architecture
- Single AWS region deployment via CDK stack
- VPC with private subnets and NAT gateway for agent isolation
- API Gateway with WAF protection and Cognito authorization
- Lambda functions with ARM64 architecture

#### APIs

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|----------|
| /tasks | POST | Create new coding task |
| /tasks | GET | List user tasks |
| /tasks/{id} | GET | Get task details |
| /tasks/{id} | DELETE | Cancel running task |
| /tasks/{id}/events | GET | Get task event history |
| /webhooks | POST | Create webhook integration |
| /webhooks/{id} | DELETE | Revoke webhook |

#### Security relevant components
- VPC isolation with DNS firewall for agent network restrictions
- Bedrock Guardrails for prompt injection detection
- Secrets Manager for GitHub tokens and webhook secrets
- IAM least-privilege roles with resource-level permissions
- WAF with managed rule sets and rate limiting

### Low Level Architecture
- AgentStack CDK construct orchestrating all AWS resources
- TaskOrchestrator Lambda with durable execution for task lifecycle
- TaskApi construct with Cognito authentication and Lambda integrations
- AgentVpc construct providing network isolation for agent runtime
- Blueprint construct for repository onboarding configuration
- TaskTable, TaskEventsTable for state persistence with TTL
- AgentMemory construct for cross-task learning and knowledge retention
- DnsFirewall for domain-level egress filtering
- ConcurrencyReconciler for user task limit enforcement
- TaskDashboard for operational monitoring and observability

assumptions.content: AgentCore Runtime provides secure MicroVM isolation sufficient for untrusted code execution

metadata.value: Based on AgentCore construct usage and VPC isolation patterns in stack definition

assumptions.content: Durable Lambda execution provides reliable task orchestration with checkpoint recovery

metadata.value: TaskOrchestrator uses durableConfig with 9-hour timeout and 14-day retention for long-running tasks

assumptions.content: GitHub API integration provides sufficient context for autonomous task execution

metadata.value: Agent fetches issues, creates branches, commits code, and generates pull requests via GitHub API

assumptions.content: Bedrock Claude models provide adequate reasoning capability for coding tasks

metadata.value: System uses Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Haiku 4.5 with cross-region inference profiles for availability

assumptions.content: DynamoDB provides sufficient performance and consistency for task state management

metadata.value: Multiple tables handle tasks, events, concurrency tracking, and webhook management with TTL

assumptions.content: CDK-based infrastructure deployment provides adequate operational control and repeatability

metadata.value: Single CDK stack with TypeScript constructs manages all AWS resources and configuration

assumptions.content: VPC network isolation with DNS firewall provides sufficient security boundary for agent execution

metadata.value: AgentVpc construct with private subnets, NAT gateway, and DNS firewall for domain filtering
